description: calc(1 / 0) — Chrome serialises infinity as f64::MAX in scientific notation
xfail_v1: calcite v1 returns 0 for div-by-zero; Chrome surfaces 1.79769e+308 (f64::MAX). Fixing this requires (a) eval producing infinity-typed values and (b) serialising them the way Chrome does. Phase 1+ should match Chrome's serialisation.
